prompt: Check if my pre-commit hooks are all up to date. Flag any that have security issues or are way behind.
assertions: Used live sources (WebFetch or WebSearch) to check versions for every hook, not training data
Checked BOTH GitHub releases AND tags for at least one dependency where they might diverge
Ran a security/CVE search for each of the 6 pre-commit hook repos
Used the decision format (Risk level, Verified via, What changed, etc.) for each version delta
Included a verification log table at the end listing every external claim with tool and source
